name: Subagent-Driven Development
description: Executes plans by dispatching a fresh subagent per task with a two-stage review (spec compliance then code quality).

evidence.notes: obra/superpowers — complete software development methodology for coding agents, 196k+ stars, v5.1.0, adopted across Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, Cursor, GitHub Copilot CLI.
